$comment: Memory node envelope — every write to layer ③ carries this metadata, whatever the physical store (graph node, doc, vault file frontmatter).

authority.description: promotion upward (inferred -> ratified) only via the calibration loop (⑦); L4 accepts human_authored only

who.description: principal id from ① — human or agent

source.description: event_id(s) from ②, or the upstream node_id(s) this consolidates

valid_until.description: ISO 8601 or 'until_superseded'. Judgments EXPIRE; retrieval discounts or drops stale nodes

visibility.description: role or BU scope key, resolved against ① RBAC at retrieval time — BEFORE returning results

cross_bu_edges.description: node_ids in other BUs this connects to — how silos break

supersedes.description: node_id this replaces; the old node keeps existing with valid_until set — history is never silently rewritten
